name: Gaijin Troubles
short_description: Mio Shinai is a loner, an ordinary discouraged student. But one day everything changes when a foreign student Anne breaks into Mio’s world. The hyperactive blonde works like a magnet for all sorts of troubles, and Mio is forced to resolve them.
detailed_description:
School life is not an easy one, especially when you study in a provincial establishment for tough teenage girls. Clubs are more like gangs consisting of pretty-looking bullies, student council performs duties of big Brother watching and making the rules. There is also a bunch of rebels called Sakuban who will probably involve you in some troubles.

Mio Shinai is a loner, an ordinary discouraged student. To put it mildly, school days do not cause her any delight. No friends, no motivation, only a relative sense of peace, secured by her fists. But one day everything changes when a foreign student Anne breaks into Mio’s world. The hyperactive blonde works like a magnet for all sorts of troubles and Mio is forced to resolve them.

Clumsy naive Annie - will she destroy local stability or become a ray of light in this gloomy reality?

Features:
  • Furious action combined with a visual novel.
  • Dramatic non-linear story about bullying and forming bonds.
  • Hardcore combat system with stamina management.
  • Violent girl fights: use a weapon and dirty tricks.
  • RPG elements. You can get stronger.
  • A lot of anime fan service!

Warning! All characters in the game are 18+ years old.

supported_languages: English, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Russian
